title: Eli Lilly Investor Relations
note: Official investor relations hub with earnings releases, guidance, product revenue breakdowns, and SEC filings.

title: Eli Lilly Market Cap History — CompaniesMarketCap
note: Historical market capitalization data used to assess current valuation, S&P 500 rank, and peak/trough context.

title: Eli Lilly 2024 Annual Report (Form 10-K)
note: Primary source for revenue breakdown by product, R&D pipeline status, patent expiry disclosures, manufacturing investment, and segment financials.

title: FDA Drug Approvals — Mounjaro (tirzepatide) for Type 2 Diabetes
note: FDA approval record and clinical summary for tirzepatide in the type 2 diabetes indication (approved May 2022).

title: FDA Drug Approvals — Zepbound (tirzepatide) for Obesity
note: FDA approval record for tirzepatide in the chronic weight management indication (approved November 2023).

title: FDA Drug Approvals — Kisunla (donanemab) for Alzheimer's Disease
note: FDA approval record for donanemab in early symptomatic Alzheimer's disease (approved July 2024).

title: Open Insulin Project
note: Community-driven open-source pharmaceutical manufacturing initiative; reference for the open-synthesis alternative vector in the metabolic disease product analysis.
